title: Static Duster, Feather, Plastic, Assorted Colours (1Pc), Dust Cleaner, Dust Remover, Bendable, Washable
features: DUSTER WITH COVER: This high-quality static duster is designed to effortlessly attract and trap dust particles, leaving your surfaces spotless, retractable cover ensures that the duster remains clean and protected

QUALITY MATERIAL: Zale Yardley static duster is made of high-quality materials which can be used repeatedly and provide long-lasting effectiveness, strong handle and superior feathers are built to resist the rigors of cleaning

EASY DUSTING: The bendable non slip grip handle of duster give and comfortable and a convenient cleaning experience, ideal length of the handle allows for easy reach and flexibility clean the required area

EFFECTIVE CLEANING: The duster excels at cleaning, effectively removing dust, lint, fuzz, and cobwebs from every nook and cranny of your home, it tackles anything from blinds to bannisters, bookcases to walls, corners to woodwork with precision and simplicity.

Customer Satisfaction: Our promise is to always give best product and service to our valued customers so feel free to contact us for any query, we are always here to help you, your queries will be answered within 24 hours.
description: Zale Yardley Static Duster soft and gentle bristles attract and capture even the smallest particles, keeping your surfaces clean and free of unattractive clutter. Cleaning duster comes with a retractable protective cover that keeps the feather fibers clean and protected when not in use. This preserves the cleaning duster's effectiveness and extends its lifespan. Duster is hand-washable when it gets dirty. WHY CHOOSE US?
